title: Clear Head
body:
**ClearHead** is a simple client-side mod that removes the obstructive pumpkin overlay, granting you full, unobstructed vision while wearing a carved pumpkin.

This mod is perfect for roleplayers and creatives. Wear a carved pumpkin as a cosmetic helmet, a spooky mask for your character's costume, or a disguise without sacrificing your ability to see the world. You retain the vanilla benefit of being able to look at Endermen safely, but without the screen-blocking blur.

## Features

*   **Unobstructed Vision:** Enjoy a perfectly clear view while wearing a pumpkin head.
*   **Roleplay Freedom:** Fully embrace character aesthetics. Now your scarecrow or spooky character build doesn't have to come at the cost of playability.
*   **Simple Configuration:** Need the overlay back for a moment? Easily toggle the effect on or off at any time through the Mod Menu.

With ClearHead, you can finally enjoy both the function of Enderman-gazing and the fashion of wearing a pumpkin, with absolutely no compromises.
